body:
## Summary

Fixes #1524 ÔÇö Standardizes the `/version` Telegram command output by applying consistent formatting rules across all 60+ software version parsers.

### Changes

**Version string standardization:**
- **Strip OS/architecture info**: Ruby `[x86_64-linux]`, Go `linux/amd64`, cURL `(x86_64-pc-linux-gnu)`, Deno `x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu`, Lean arch
- **Normalize dates to ISO YYYY-MM-DD**: Screen `20-Aug-23` Ôćĺ `2023-08-20`, Zip `July 5th 2008` Ôćĺ `2008-07-05`, Unzip `20 April 2009` Ôćĺ `2009-04-20`, PHP `built: Jan 13 2026 22:36:55` Ôćĺ `2026-01-13 22:36:55`
- **Remove redundant data**: Swift `(swift-6.0.3-RELEASE)`, Claude Code `(Claude Code)`, Kotlin `-release-208`, PHP `(cli)`
- **Strip distro suffixes**: GCC/G++ `13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04.1` Ôćĺ `13.3.0`, Xvfb `21.1.12-1ubuntu1.5` Ôćĺ `21.1.12`
- **Remove URLs**: Clang `(https://github.com/... 2e6139970eda)` Ôćĺ `(2e6139970eda)`
- **Reorder Ruby**: `(2026-03-11 revision 76cca827ab)` Ôćĺ `(76cca827ab, 2026-03-11, +PRISM)`

**Telegram compatibility:**
- Renamed section header from `C/C++/Assembly` to `C, C++, Assembly` to prevent Telegram from treating `/Assembly` as a clickable bot command

**Enhanced platform detection:**
- Environment: docker container / virtual machine / host machine
- Architecture: human-friendly names (e.g., `AMD64 (x86-64)`)
- OS: full distro name and version from `/etc/os-release`
- Kernel: full kernel version string

**Before Ôćĺ After examples:**
| Tool | Before | After |
|------|--------|-------|
| Ruby | `3.4.9 (2026-03-11 revision 76cca827ab, +PRISM [x86_64-linux])` | `3.4.9 (76cca827ab, 2026-03-11, +PRISM)` |
| cURL | `8.19.0 (x86_64-pc-linux-gnu)` | `8.19.0` |
| GCC | `13.3.0-6ubuntu2~24.04.1` | `13.3.0` |
| Xvfb | `21.1.12-1ubuntu1.5` | `21.1.12` |
| Screen | `4.09.01 (GNU, 20-Aug-23)` | `4.09.01 (2023-08-20)` |
| Unzip | `6.00 (20 April 2009)` | `6.00 (2009-04-20)` |
| Zip | `3.0 (July 5th 2008)` | `3.0 (2008-07-05)` |
| Swift | `6.0.3 (swift-6.0.3-RELEASE)` | `6.0.3` |
| Deno | `2.7.9 (stable, release, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu)` | `2.7.9 (stable)` |
| PHP | `8.3.30 (cli, built: Jan 13 2026 22:36:55, NTS)` | `8.3.30 (2026-01-13 22:36:55, NTS)` |
| Claude Code | `2.1.92 (Claude Code)` | `2.1.92` |
| Clang | `17.0.0 (https://github.com/swiftlang/llvm-project.git 2e6139...)` | `17.0.0 (2e6139...)` |
| Platform | `linux (x64)` | Environment: `docker container`, Architecture: `AMD64 (x86-64)`, OS: `Ubuntu 24.04.1 LTS`, Kernel: `Linux 6.8.0-94-generic` |

## Test plan

- [x] 70 parseVersion unit tests pass (including all new standardization rules)
- [x] 19 getVersionInfo integration tests pass (including new platform detection)
- [x] 22 formatVersionMessage tests pass (including new section header)
- [x] 8 telegram bot version tests pass
- [x] Verified `normalizeDate()` handles DD-Mon-YY, DD Month YYYY, Month DDth YYYY, Month DD YYYY HH:MM:SS formats
- [x] Verified backward compatibility: legacy `platform` field still populated for existing consumers

­čĄľ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: feat: standardize /version output ÔÇö strip OS/arch, normalize dates, enhance platform (#1524)
